properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: For so long I carried the weight of my past Cripple by burdens like stones on my back I thought I had fallen too far from your grace But you came and showed me the way

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: When I was lost soul searching You were the ground beneath my feet When I was blind man begging You were the eyes so I could see When the smoke was rising up You were the air that I could breath You gave me hope you gave me something to believe

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Now I'm alive and born again Rescued from the grip of sin God your love came crashing in And pulled me out of the fire I'm a survivor

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Now all I can see are the fields of your grace Wherever I run your leading the way You shook the shackles off my feet I found redemption on my knees You gave me hope you gave me something to believe

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Now I'm alive and born again Rescued from the grip of sin God your love came crashing in And pulled me out of the fire I'm a survivor Oh I'm a survivor

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: You're my God You're my fighter You make me a survivor

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Now I'm alive and born again Rescued from the grip of sin God your love came crashing in And pulled me out of the fire I'm a survivor Oh I'm a survivor You pulled me out of the fire I'm a survivor
